scripts.prebuild: npm run lint:check && npm run typecheck

overridesNotes._intro: Documentation for the `overrides` block below. npm forbids unknown keys inside `overrides`, so the per-package rationale lives here instead. Reviewed 2026-05-16 against `npm audit` after direct-dep upgrades. Each override stays inside the consumer's current major to avoid breaking-API churn; nested form is used where parents pin incompatible ranges (e.g. minimatch 3.x vs 9.x). See `docs/SECURITY_ADVISORIES.md` for the full audit trail.
overridesNotes.handlebars: ts-jest -> handlebars: 8 CVEs incl. critical AST type-confusion / prototype-pollution XSS / DoS. 4.7.9 patches all; ts-jest uses handlebars internally as a templating helper - no breaking changes within 4.x.
overridesNotes.flatted: eslint -> file-entry-cache -> flat-cache -> flatted: prototype pollution + unbounded recursion DoS (GHSA-25h7-pfq9-p65f, GHSA-rf6f-7fwh-wjgh). 3.4.2 patches both; drop-in compatible.
overridesNotes.lodash: express-validator -> lodash: 3 high CVEs incl. prototype pollution and code injection (GHSA-xxjr-mmjv-4gpg, GHSA-r5fr-rjxr-66jc, GHSA-f23m-r3pf-42rh). 4.18.x is forward-compatible with 4.17.x for the surface express-validator consumes.
overridesNotes.validator: express-validator -> validator: incomplete filtering of special elements (GHSA-vghf-hv5q-vc2g). 13.15.22+ patches; same major.
overridesNotes.path-to-regexp: express 5 -> router -> path-to-regexp: 2 ReDoS CVEs (GHSA-j3q9-mxjg-w52f, GHSA-27v5-c462-wpq7). 8.4.2 patches both; same major as express 5's range.
overridesNotes.body-parser: express -> body-parser: DoS via header parsing (chained via qs). 2.2.2 patches; same major.
overridesNotes.qs: express + supertest -> qs: prototype pollution via __proto__ in 6.x. 6.15.1 patches; semver-compatible.
overridesNotes.yaml: lint-staged -> yaml: stack overflow via deeply nested collections (GHSA-48c2-rrv3-qjmp). 2.8.3+ patches; same major.
overridesNotes.glob: jest internals -> glob: command injection via -c CLI flag (GHSA-5j98-mcp5-4vw2). 10.5.0 patches; jest uses glob as a library not via CLI so impact was nil, but patched for completeness within 10.x.
overridesNotes.picomatch_notes: jest-util / micromatch / anymatch -> picomatch: method-injection + ReDoS (GHSA-3v7f-55p6-f55p, GHSA-c2c7-rcm5-vvqj). Nested overrides keep major-version compatibility: jest-util consumes 4.x; micromatch/lint-staged/anymatch (via jest-haste-map) consume 2.x.
overridesNotes.minimatch_notes: eslint and jest -> minimatch: ReDoS + globstar backtracking. minimatch 3.x and 9.x have incompatible default-export APIs so we override per parent.
overridesNotes.brace-expansion_notes: minimatch chains -> brace-expansion: ReDoS. Nested overrides bump 1.x to 1.1.13+ and 2.x to 2.0.3+ (both patches stay within their major).
overridesNotes.ajv_notes: eslint -> ajv: prototype pollution in 6.x (advisory range: ajv <6.14.0). 6.15.0 patches; same major.
overridesNotes.js-yaml_notes: ts-jest -> @istanbuljs/load-nyc-config -> js-yaml 3.x; eslint -> js-yaml 4.x. Both lines vulnerable; patched per major via nested overrides.
overridesNotes.diff_notes: ts-node -> diff: ReDoS in 4.x patch lines; 4.0.4 patches without bumping ts-node's pinned major.
overridesNotes.follow-redirects_note: axios -> follow-redirects already on 1.15.11 which is the fixed version per the advisory; no override needed post-axios upgrade.
overridesNotes.ip-address_note: express-rate-limit -> ip-address: patched by the express-rate-limit direct-dep upgrade; no override needed.
